homepage.text_excerpt: Greg Smith MP | Mid Buckinghamshire Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact Greg Smith Member of Parliament for Mid Buckinghamshire I'm Greg Smith MP, your local Conservative Member of Parliament for Mid Buckinghamshire. Covering the market towns of Princes Risborough, Wendover, and the surrounding villages. I live here in Chearsley, with my young family, and want to make our beautiful part of the country an even better place to live, work, and bring up a family. I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in-touch. Leave this field blank Want to stay up to date? Your email First name Last name Postcode Address ID Address 1 The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy. Save our Mid Bucks fire stations In just a few months of taking control, the Liberal Democrat Chaired Fire Authority has announced plans to consult on closing Great Missenden Fire Station, Stokenchurch Fire Station and removing Haddenham’s only fire engine. Under their plans nearly a third of Buckinghamshire fire engines would be cut. This is a dangerous and entirely unnecessary plan that Greg Smith MP and local Conservatives are fighting vigorously. There is no case for these cuts. The previous Conservative-run Fire Authority rejected these proposals. pages.title: About Greg Smith MP | Greg Smith
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
pages.text_excerpt: About Greg Smith MP | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact About Greg Smith MP Tweet Hello, I’m Greg Smith MP, and I’m honoured to have been re-elected as the Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency in 2024 and I’m excited to continue serving you and your family. Previously, I had the privilege of representing the Buckingham constituency for four and a half years. My family and I are proud to call the village of Chearsley home. I live here with my wonderful family: my wife, Annalise, my eight-year-old son Jacob, six-year-old Charlie, and four-year-old Rupert. Before my election to Parliament, I built a career in print, design, and marketing, working with clients across manufacturing, medical technology, and charitable sectors. Throughout my career, I have been driven by a commitment to get things done - a principle that continues to guide me in Parliament. Locally, I’m dedicated to protecting our beautiful countryside. I have long opposed the environmentally damaging HS2 railway project, and I’m proud to have successfully campaigned to stop the Oxford-Cambridge Expressway. While I understand the need for more housing across the UK, I strongly believe that we should focus on developing brownfield sites in towns and cities, rather than encroaching on our precious green spaces. As a father, I understand firsthand the challenges of childcare costs, which often hold parents back from rejoining the workforce. That’s why I was pleased to see the previous Conservative Government deliver the largest-ever expansion of free childcare. Every child deserves the opportunity to reach their full potential, and I’m committed to making that vision a reality. I am also passionate about preserving the British countryside and supporting our farmers. I do what I can on my wife’s family farm and am a strong advocate for our rural way of life. As a lifelong McLaren supporter, I also enjoy Formula 1 and am especially proud that my former Buckingham constituency was home to roughly half of the iconic Silverstone track. Since 2024, I have been a Shadow Transport, Shadow Business, and Shadow Energy Security and Net Zero Minister, and you can see all of my Opposition front bench contributions from the Despatch Box across my social media channels. In 2026, I became the Parliamentary (Commons) Chair of the Conservative Friends of Israel. I’m here to serve you, and I am always eager to hear from my constituents. Thank you for taking the time to learn a bit more about me, "I've seen Greg Smith working as a strong constituency-focussed MP over the past four and a half years. Having represented much of the new Mid Bucks seat myself in the past, I know Greg will do you proud, being out and about in our community and getting our voice heard in Westminster." — Rt. Hon. Sir David Lidington, former MP for Aylesbury and Deputy Prime Minister Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Greg Smith MP Listening to you My contributions in Parliament Promoted by Greg Smith of 34 Buckingham Road, Winslow MK18 3DY Copyright 2026 Greg Smith. pages.title: Listening to you | Greg Smith
pages.meta_description: The most important thing for any politician to do is listen. As your Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency, I want to hear what you think, either locally or when it comes to national policies.
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
pages.text_excerpt: Listening to you | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact Listening to you Tweet The most important thing for any politician to do is listen. As your Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency, I want to hear what you think, either locally or when it comes to national policies. This survey is part of the pledge I made to ensure I am accessible, contactable, and visible across the market towns, villages and hamlets of the 336 square miles of the Mid Buckinghamshire constituency. My mission will always be to serve as Mid Buckinghamshire's champion in Westminster, not Westminster's voice in Mid Buckinghamshire. Please do complete the survey here and let me know what matters most to you and your family. I will read every submission personally and ensure your views are heard clearly. I look forward to hearing from you, Greg Smith MP Bluetree_survey Current National Issues Get involved Your details Leave this field blank What is the most important question for you and your family right now? pages.title: Surgeries | Greg Smith
pages.meta_description: Greg holds regular help and advice surgeries around the constituency. See below the list of surgeries taking place throughout 2026 across Mid Buckinghamshire:
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact Surgeries Tweet Greg holds regular help and advice surgeries around the constituency. See below the list of surgeries taking place throughout 2026 across Mid Buckinghamshire: 15th May - Stokenchurch 19th June - Brill 17th July - Prestwood 21st August - East Claydon 18th September - Naphill 20th November - Waddesdon 18th December - Princes Risborough To book an appointment please email: [email protected] or call 020 7219 4287 . Greg also holds a series of less formal "pint of view" pub surgeries for local residents to let him know what's on their minds.
